not just festivals get people scratching heads here bc we like fighting our foods well bullfighting i mean folks are either thrilled or totally weirded out but hey its all history and culture no?
animal events are a big draw for tourists, but we have other activities that leave visitors scratching their heads every time
yikes thats gotta feel refreshing lol
sure throwing parties for people with dietary restrictions sounds unusual but ever heard people hanging red underwear outside for good luck? twists everywhere
budgets ignored turned my friend's life upside down gotta watch out
outsides shiny insides murky
planning schmanning stores teach ya agility beats manuals
stock up on normal stuff like coffee
old ways die hard esp when u gotta deal with customers instead of business owners tricks up your sleeve make all difference just keep flipping their script
ran my business for a while dealing with vendors always doubting cuz i had to play hardball show em business knows no gender just smarts & grit
